name: Yokohama Bay
tagline: The end of the road on the west side — wild, empty, and painted in fire every evening.
parking: Free lot at end of Farrington Hwy
hours: Open daily, 7:00 AM – 7:45 PM (gates locked at closing)
bestTime: Sunset year-round; summer for swimming (winter has dangerous surf)
talkStory: Zero shade — bring water, sunscreen, and a hat. Swimming in summer only; winter surf is powerful and there are no lifeguards. Ka'ena Point Trail starts here for a spectacular coastal hike to Oahu's westernmost tip. Dolphins sometimes visible offshore in the morning.
